what_went_well: 100 new E2E tests across 3 test files — all pass in 1.14s (well within 60s constraint)
TypeScript compiles cleanly with zero errors (tsc --noEmit passes)
No hardcoded secrets, tokens, or .env files with real values in any changed file
All imports reference real, existing modules with correct export signatures
Mock patterns are consistent: executor mocked at boundary, context-guard mocked, db-info mocked — no real LLM/DB calls
Real filesystem (tmpdir) used for all test state — no fs mocking, matching project conventions
Proper test isolation: each test gets its own createTestRoot(), cleanup in afterEach with rmSync
Comprehensive coverage: pipeline lifecycle, HITL flow, retry flow, stall detection, error categorization, batch promotion, dependency resolution, singleton lock
Fixtures extended cleanly: git repo fixture, mock result builders (mockSuccess/mockFailure/mockHitlWaiting), pipeline plan helper, root-cause counter
Artifact result.json files updated to reflect current task context accurately
what_went_wrong: fixtures.ts used require('node:fs') for readdirSync inside ESM module — FIXED by auditor (replaced with top-level import)
improvement_suggestions: Design spec called for __tests__/e2e/ subdirectory but tests placed directly in __tests__/ — acceptable pragmatic deviation but spec should be updated to match
Design spec called for separate mock-executor.ts and git-fixture.ts helper files but functionality was inlined into fixtures.ts — simpler but deviates from spec
vitest.config.ts was not updated with E2E-specific timeout configuration as specified in tasks.md task 1.4 — tests pass without it since they're fast, but could be fragile
Some tests use 'as any' type casts (e2e-batch.test.ts lines 320-338) for worker_id/claimed_at — indicates TaskState interface may need extension
7 pre-existing test failures remain (out of scope but noted)
deviations_from_spec: File placement: __tests__/e2e-*.test.ts instead of __tests__/e2e/*.test.ts (flat vs subdirectory)
Helper consolidation: mock executor and git fixture inlined into fixtures.ts instead of separate files
vitest.config.ts not updated with E2E timeout configuration (task 1.4 from tasks.md)
Some task items from tasks.md not implemented: headless watch mode tests (4.3), worker pool spawn/reap simulation (4.2), circular dependency detection (2.2)

fixes_applied_detail: fixtures.ts: Replaced require('node:fs') with top-level ESM import of readdirSync — consistent with module system
